message:
feat(rich_rust): add comprehensive sync module tests and E2E test suites

Sync Module Enhancements (src/sync.rs):
- Expand lock_recover function with comprehensive test coverage
- Add tests for clean (non-poisoned) mutex recovery
- Add tests for poisoned mutex recovery after panic
- Test that recovered data maintains integrity after poisoning
- Test multiple recovery cycles on same poisoned mutex
- Add tests for lock_recover_with_default fallback behavior
- Test interior mutability with RefCell inside recovered lock
- Test multi-threaded concurrent recovery scenarios
- Verify barrier-synchronized thread coordination with recovery
- Add tests for RwLock recovery (both read and write guards)
- Test try_lock variants for both Mutex and RwLock

E2E Markdown Tests (tests/e2e_markdown.rs):
- Add end-to-end tests for Markdown rendering feature
- Test header rendering (h1-h6) with proper formatting
- Test list rendering (ordered, unordered, nested)
- Test code block rendering with syntax highlighting
- Test inline formatting (bold, italic, strikethrough)
- Test link and image rendering
- Test blockquote rendering
- Test table rendering with alignment
- Test complex documents combining multiple elements
- Include HTML export verification for rendered markdown

E2E Mutex Poison Tests (tests/e2e_mutex_poison.rs):
- Add end-to-end tests for mutex poison recovery scenarios
- Test Console operations surviving internal mutex poison
- Test multi-threaded Console access with panic recovery
- Verify rendering continues after thread panic
- Test barrier-synchronized thread coordination
- Use BufferWriter for output capture in tests
- Verify lock_recover utility integration with Console

These tests provide comprehensive coverage for the sync primitives used
throughout rich_rust and verify the library's resilience to panic scenarios
in multi-threaded environments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
